dashboard.label: Dataset Export — HuggingFace Readiness
dashboard.description: Monitor dataset volume, schema completeness, and export readiness for HuggingFace-compatible JSONL export matching the emmanuelgjr/genai-incidents schema.

search.query: `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.technique_id=AML.* | stats dc(framework.technique_id) as count
`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ incident_id=* testbed_mode=KILL_CHAIN_ACTIVE | stats dc(incident_id) as count

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count AS total_events, dc(framework.technique_id) AS unique_techniques | eval readiness=case(total_events>1000 AND unique_techniques>20,"READY",total_events>100,"PARTIAL",1=1,"INSUFFICIENT") | fields readiness
`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | timechart count by testbed_mode span=1d | fillnull value=0

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | eval has_technique=if(isnotnull(framework.technique_id) AND framework.technique_id!="",1,0) | eval has_severity=if(isnotnull(framework.severity) AND framework.severity!="",1,0) | eval has_cvss=if(isnotnull(framework.cvss_score) AND framework.cvss_score!="",1,0) | eval has_owasp_llm=if(isnotnull(framework.owasp_llm) AND framework.owasp_llm!="",1,0) | eval has_owasp_asi=if(isnotnull(framework.owasp_asi) AND framework.owasp_asi!="",1,0) | eval has_maestro=if(isnotnull(framework.maestro_layers) AND framework.maestro_layers!="",1,0) | eval has_nist=if(isnotnull(framework.nist_ai_rmf) AND framework.nist_ai_rmf!="",1,0) | eval has_incident_id=if(isnotnull(incident_id) AND incident_id!="",1,0) | stats avg(has_technique) AS technique_pct, avg(has_severity) AS severity_pct, avg(has_cvss) AS cvss_pct, avg(has_owasp_llm) AS owasp_llm_pct, avg(has_owasp_asi) AS owasp_asi_pct, avg(has_maestro) AS maestro_pct, avg(has_nist) AS nist_pct, avg(has_incident_id) AS incident_id_pct | eval technique_pct=round(technique_pct*100,1) | eval severity_pct=round(severity_pct*100,1) | eval cvss_pct=round(cvss_pct*100,1) | eval owasp_llm_pct=round(owasp_llm_pct*100,1) | eval owasp_asi_pct=round(owasp_asi_pct*100,1) | eval maestro_pct=round(maestro_pct*100,1) | eval nist_pct=round(nist_pct*100,1) | eval incident_id_pct=round(incident_id_pct*100,1) | transpose | rename column AS "Schema Field", "row 1" AS "Completeness %"

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.severity=* | stats count AS events, dc(framework.technique_id) AS techniques, dc(incident_id) AS incidents BY framework.severity | eval pct=round(events/total*100,1) | appendcols [search `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count AS total | fields total] | eval pct=round(events/total*100,1) | sort case(framework.severity,"Critical",1,"High",2,"Medium",3,"Low",4) | table framework.severity events pct techniques incidents | rename framework.severity AS "Severity", events AS "Events", pct AS "% of Dataset", techniques AS "Unique Techniques", incidents AS "Kill-Chain Incidents"

html.p: Export synthetic dataset (69 records from taxonomy)

Compatible with: emmanuelgjr/genai-incidents schema v2026.05
Output: /var/log/defenseclaw/acme_synthetic_dataset.jsonl
